history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark, curly hair, wearing a black t-shirt with white text that reads "NOTHING OF CHAOS" and black pants, stands in a dimly lit public restroom. They are holding a cigarette and leaning against a tiled wall. Their left arm has a tattoo of a star. In the reflection of a large mirror above a black countertop with sinks, another person, presumably the same individual, is visible from the back, wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic of a submachine gun. The restroom has light grey tiled walls and floors, with some water on the floor near the sinks. The lighting is somewhat harsh, coming from above and reflected in the mirror. A dark brown water bottle stands on the floor. The overall mood is somewhat moody and urban. The image is a screenshot from a social media app, indicated by the UI elements at the bottom, including a search bar at the top with the text "ada berondong tua".
